label: Data repository
description: Long-term scientific data repository (EDI, DataONE, ESS-DIVE, BCO-DMO, NSIDC, Pangaea, Zenodo, Figshare).

label: Data portal
description: Agency-operated data portal with search + download (NEON Data Portal, USGS NWIS, NOAA NCEI, USDA Ag Data Commons).

label: THREDDS server
description: OPeNDAP / THREDDS data server for gridded NetCDF (UCAR Unidata stack).

label: ERDDAP server
description: NOAA ERDDAP / IOOS-DMAC tabular + gridded data server.

label: ERDDAP server (alias)
description: Alias for erddap-server — accepted for agent flexibility.

label: Observatory network
description: Network of monitoring observatories with shared data management (NERRS / SWMP, OOI Coastal Endurance, MarineGEO).

label: Institutional lab archive
description: Single-laboratory or single-institution data archive (Scripps CO2, WHOI Open Access, MBARI archive).

label: Product suite
description: Single-data-product family (NSIDC Sea Ice Index, NOAA OISST, NEON AOP).

label: Repository federation
description: Federation of partnering repositories (DataONE).

label: Generic network
description: Generic network slot used when no other archive_type fits.

label: STAC catalog
description: SpatioTemporal Asset Catalog (NASA, USGS Landsat / 3DEP, NOAA, AWS Open Data).

label: OAI-PMH provider
description: Metadata-only Open Archives Initiative endpoint.

label: Data cube
description: Pre-aggregated multi-dimensional cube (Open Data Cube, GEE, Microsoft Planetary Computer).

label: Cloud-bucket archive
description: Direct cloud-storage object archive (S3 / GCS / Azure / OpenStack Swift).

label: API service
description: REST / GraphQL API not backed by a single addressable repository.

label: Cross-archive aggregator
description: Federation that wraps multiple archives (DataONE, GBIF, OBIS, GEOSS, NCEI).

label: Package distribution
description: Python / R / Conda package distributing software + reference data (CRAN, PyPI, Bioconductor).

label: Synthesis consortium
description: International / cross-archive synthesis aggregator (WGMS Fluctuations of Glaciers, GLIMS, RGI, FLUXNET2015) — adds value beyond a passthrough federation.

label: Knowledge network
description: Region- or topic-focused knowledge hub linking many resources but holding minimal canonical data (USDA Climate Hubs, ESIP, SHRUB-Hub).

label: Agency program
description: Program-level entity that publishes data via multiple downstream archives (USGS WEBB, USGS 3DEP, EPA NEP, NOAA Sea Grant).

label: Web service
description: Single-purpose web service (StreamStats, NWIS WaterServices, NASS Quick Stats CropScape WMS) — not a repository in itself.
